name: zpwrchrome
description: Chrome extension — UNIX `pass` integration (browserpass-compatible), segmented download manager (default Chrome takeover), JetBrains-style tab switcher with scenes + opener-tree + minimap, fzf history search, Tampermonkey-equivalent userscripts, full-page screenshot, Wappalyzer-compatible tech detection, cyberpunk page-theme injector, Turn Off the Lights cinema dimmer, JSON viewer, UA switcher, find-in-all-tabs. 54 keyboard commands.
author: MenkeTechnologies
